title: Encrypted Machine Learning Inference
author: Cipher Jordan
Privacy-Preserving ML Engineer
description: Run inference on encrypted data with secure multi-party computation—but latency is 1000x higher
content:
Secure multi-party computation enables ML inference without exposing private data.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Privacy Computation Bottleneck (2041)](/docs/articles/privacy-bottleneck-2041)
